finding_results.notes: Added documented recon coaching action and explicit laundry-only hold with temporary audit sticker removal, then restored access after clean shifts; end beat now explicitly names that the hold is off when extra audit coverage is accepted.
Replaced abstract affair shorthand with observable memory details (bathroom mirror, Marisol, unanswered call) and explicit harm naming to Nora and June (mortgage burden and rationed meal swipes).

Voicemail now includes an unhedged emotional admission (shame and missing June) that is not reduced to work/money reporting, and immediate aftermath remains embodied rather than logistical self-management.
Removed recurring 'landed harder' formula and replaced it with a Reno-specific physical reaction tied to Eli's cracked rib and work context.

summary: All four pass-scoped structural/craft findings were addressed in-place in chapter 14, with a concrete managerial status change arc, stronger affair-accountability specificity, a less hedged emotional voicemail beat, and removal of repeated impact formula language.
